title: SE7EN
overview: As criminals known as Akudama terrorize Kansai, an ordinary citizen gets dragged into danger when her good intentions steer her wrong.

title: RESERVOIR DOGS
overview: The Akudama learn from the plan’s mastermind just how risky and troublesome it will be. As if things weren’t bad enough, trouble comes looking for them first.

title: MISSION: IMPOSSIBLE
overview: When the infiltration doesn’t go as expected and they’re running out of time, the group will have to improvise to pull off the ultimate heist.

title: SPEED
overview: The Shinkansen speeds ahead, hurtling the crew towards certain death. As they race against time to reach the vault, Executioners show up to derail their plans.

title: DEAD MAN WALKING
overview: As the Executioners deal with the aftermath of their failure, the Akudama take a break to recuperate and finally find out their destination.

title: BROTHER
overview: When one Executioner arrives for a showdown, Brawler couldn't be happier. As the bloodbath rages on, Pupil struggles to understand why she was left behind.

title: THE CITY OF LOST CHILDREN
overview: After a long journey, the team finally reaches their destination. Before the children say their goodbyes, Brother shares his side of the story.

title: BLACK RAIN
overview: The Akudama struggle to survive as the hunt for their heads intensifies. While Doctor and Hoodlum run amok, Swindler takes on the role of big sister.

title: THE SHINING
overview: Courier joins up with Swindler as they attempt to track Brother down. Meanwhile, Cutthroat is seeing red and is thirstier than ever for blood.

title: BABEL
overview: Drastic measures are taken to subdue the civilian uprising. Knowing it's their last chance to save Brother, Courier and crew race towards a showdown at Kansai Station.

title: WAR GAMES
overview: Sometimes, the truth is harder to believe than fiction. Unbeknownst to them, Swindler and Courier are at risk of being trapped in Kanto forever.

title: AKUDAMA DRIVE
overview: Swindler and Courier have been driven into a corner but are not about to give up. Swindler is prepared to play the part if it will help the children escape.
